title: Preparation of Anhydrous Halides of Lanthanides.. Part It Preparation of Anhydrous Halides of Lanthanum and Cerium (III)
author: H. C. Pant
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A brief but critical review of the method of preparation of lanthanum and cerium (III) halides Anhydrous halides of these metals have been prepared by a new method in which inspection of the  respective acetate the toluene or benzene is successively saturated with dry ammonium and lanthanide halide and sublimation of ammonium halide thereform. The yields are almost quantitative. However, pure iodides could not be prepared by this method.
